notes: Section 6261, , , ; , §§ 103(b)(1), (c)(1), 105(a)(1)–(3), (5), , , 755, 756; H. Res. 549, , required the President to transmit to Congress energy conservation contingency plans and rationing contingency plans and provided requirements for plans to become effective and for amendment, approval, and implementation of plans.Pub. Section 6263, , , ; , §§ 103(a), (c)(2), 104, 105(b)(1)–(5), , , 755, 756, provided requirements for rationing contingency plan, and in subsec. (f) provided that all authority to carry out a plan would expire on same date as authority to issue and enforce rules and orders under the Emergency Petroleum Allocation Act of 1973, et seq.Pub.
